Every child deserves a book to call their own.

"A book is a gift you can open again and again."

Who We Are

A Family Mission, Now an Official Foundation

What began three years ago as two siblings with a shared belief — that every child deserves access to books — has grown into the Parker Storylight Foundation. Officially incorporated as a nonprofit this year, our roots run deep in South Louisiana and in the communities we serve.

We focus on Title I schools: high-poverty, high-minority communities where books at home are a luxury many families can't afford. We collect gently loved and brand-new books and get them directly into the hands of the children who need them most.

"We started this because we knew firsthand how much a single book can change a child's world. We're just getting started."

— The Parker Co-Founders

What We Do

Lighting the Way, One Book at a Time

From book drives to community events, everything we do is designed to put the right book in the right child's hands — and spark a love of reading that lasts a lifetime.

📚

Book Collections

We host drives and partner with donors to collect new and gently used books across South Louisiana — building our inventory one donation at a time.

🏫

Title I School Focus

We deliberately target high-poverty, high-minority Title I schools — the communities where access to books at home makes the biggest difference.

🌟

Community Events

Our book distribution events are celebrations of reading — designed to be joyful, welcoming experiences for children and families alike.

Support Our Mission

Your Gift Opens a World of Stories

Every dollar you give goes directly toward purchasing and distributing books to children in South Louisiana's highest-need communities. We are a lean, passion-driven organization — your generosity makes a real and immediate difference.

Your donation helps us:

  • Purchase new books for distribution events
  • Cover costs for community book drives
  • Bring reading experiences to more Title I schools
  • Grow our reach to more children and families

Make a Donation

Every book starts with a gift like yours.
